title: Asus TUF Gaming A16 (2024) launched in Nepal with Ryzen 7 7445HS and RTX 4050!
summary: Asus recently refreshed its entry-level TUF gaming laptops for 2024. The variant, which launched in Nepal, comes with AMD Ryzen 7 7445HS paired with an NVIDIA RTX 4050 GPU. So yeah, in this article, I will discuss everything you need to know about the Asus TUF Gaming A16 (2024), including its specifications, official price in Nepal, and availability details. Advertisement Asus TUF Gaming A16 (2024
content:
Asus recently refreshed its entry-level TUF gaming laptops for 2024. The variant, which launched in Nepal, comes with AMD Ryzen 7 7445HS paired with an NVIDIA RTX 4050 GPU. So yeah, in this article, I will discuss everything you need to know about the Asus TUF Gaming A16 (2024), including its specifications, official price in Nepal, and availability details. Advertisement Asus TUF Gaming A16 (2024) Overview: Design and Display Starting with the design, ASUS says the TUF A16 (2024) features a new “ultra-durable” design inspired by the futuristic robots we see in movies. Basically, it just means the laptops are built to handle everyday knocks and bumps without much worry. For this, the device has met the requirements for the MIL-STD-810H rating. For colors, we only get the gray color option, but there are two slightly different looks. “Jaeger Gray” has a more bold, raised TUF logo, while “Mecha Gray” is a bit more professional with a subtle logo that blends in more. Talking about the display, here we get a large 16-inch IPS panel with an FHD+ resolution. This time, Asus has gone with a more modern 16:10 aspect ratio instead of the traditional 16:9. That means you get more vertical space about 11% extra screen area, which reduces the need for scrolling and makes it better for productivity tasks. Speaking of productivity, the panel covers around 75.35% of the Adobe RGB color space. It’s not top-tier, but still decent for tasks like video editing and general content work. For gamers, the display features a fast 144Hz refresh rate along with support for NVIDIA G-SYNC, ensuring smoother and tear-free gaming. On top of that, this device also supports a MUX switch and NVIDIA Advanced Optimus, allowing seamless switching between the integrated GPU and dedicated GPU for better performance and efficiency. Performance and Memory Under the hood, the ASUS TUF A16 comes with an AMD Ryzen 7 7445HS (6 cores, 12 threads) CPU paired with an NVIDIA RTX 4050 GPU with a 135W TGP. While this combination handles everyday tasks without any issue, it may struggle if you are more of a performance-centric user. Okay, let's say if you are a power user, especially one who is into machine learning, AI workloads, or serious gaming, the hardware might feel quite underwhelming. The CPU lacks a higher core count, which is expected at this level, and the RTX 4050, despite its relatively high power limit, remains an entry-level GPU. On the memory side of things, you get 16GB of DDR5 RAM, and for storage, you get 512GB of Gen 4 SSD storage . Battery and Connectivity Under the hood, a decent-sized 54Wh battery powers the Asus TUF A16 (2024). It features WiFi 6 and Bluetooth 5.3 for wireless connectivity. As for the ports, you are limited to USB 3.2 Gen 2 speeds and don’t get USB 4 like in the smaller TUF A15 (2024) . For ports, we have 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C, 1x USB-A, HDMI 2.1, an ethernet port, and a 3.5mm audio jack. Asus TUF Gaming A16 (2024) Specifications: ASUS TUF Gaming A16 (2024) Processor AMD Ryzen 7 7445HS (6C/12T, up to 4.7GHz) Graphics NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4050 Laptop GPU Max TGP 135 W (with Dynamic Boost) Operating System Windows 11 Pro Display 16" IPS FHD+ (1920 x 1200), 144Hz, 75.35% Adobe RGB Memory 16GB DDR5 5800 MHz Storage 512GB Gen 4 SSD Keyboard 1-Zone RGB Keyboard Audio Dolby Atmos® Hi-Res Audio Two-Way AI Noise Cancelation WiFi / Bluetooth WiFi 6 (802.11ax) Bluetooth® v5.3 I/O Ports 2x USB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps), 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps), 1x HDMI 2.1 FRL, 1x 3.5 mm headphone jack Battery 54 Wh Dimensions 354 x 251 x 22.4 - 26.7 mm Weight 2.20 kg Also Read: Best Gaming Laptops in Nepal Under Rs. 200,000 (रु 2 Lakhs) Asus TUF Gaming A16 (2024) Price in Nepal and Availability The official Price of ASUS TUF Gaming A16 (2024) in Nepal is NPR 173,900 for the Ryzen 7 7455HS and RTX 4050 variant. You can purchase this laptop from your nearest ASUS Authorized Store. Should you buy the TUF Gaming A16 (2024) in Nepal? Looking current market status it’s quite hard to recommend an RTX 4050 laptop at this price, but since you always have to compromise on something, if you really want the latest GPU then you can go for the all-new 2025 LOQ 15 with the newer RTX 5050 compared to the 4050 on this one, though the LOQ comes with a weaker CPU than the TUF, so if you care more about a newer GPU go for the LOQ, or if you want something more balanced you can still pick this one. Meanwhile, check out our video on Don’t Buy a Budget Laptop Before Watching This!! VIDEO

The official Price of ASUS TUF Gaming A16 (2024) in Nepal is NPR 173,900 for the Ryzen 7 7455HS and RTX 4050 variant. You can purchase this laptop from your nearest ASUS Authorized Store.

Looking current market status it’s quite hard to recommend an RTX 4050 laptop at this price, but since you always have to compromise on something, if you really want the latest GPU then you can go for the all-new 2025 LOQ 15 with the newer RTX 5050 compared to the 4050 on this one, though the LOQ comes with a weaker CPU than the TUF, so if you care more about a newer GPU go for the LOQ, or if you want something more balanced you can still pick this one.
